text: @Sifertrex 2 weeks should be enough regardless of skill level. If you're dedicated, expect about 2-3 days for audio itself. The next few days go for visuals (not in this video specifically, though; this one is just a simple videos w/ fx put on top of each other). I guess it is possible to wrap everything up in one day, though, but you often get tired after a 2-hour session.
